equity.note: Bigger equity drawdowns imply more stress.

rates.note: A rise in front-end yields can tighten financial conditions.

title: 2025-10-27 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 16.13
description: New daily signal for 2025-10-27: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 16.13/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-10-27, the score printed 16.13/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
